shortDescription: London has more than a million street trees. Most of us walk past them every day without really noticing them. London Tree Map puts them on a map you can actually use. Zoom into your neighbourhood, tap a tree, and see everything the app knows about it.
longDescription:
London has more than a million street trees. Most of us walk past them every day without really noticing them.

London Tree Map puts them on a map you can actually use. Zoom into your neighbourhood, tap a tree, and see everything the app knows about it. Search and filter in Discover, or save trees you want to find again.

The Insights tab is for the curious: how trees are spread across boroughs, which species show up most often, and other ways to see the bigger picture.

If something on the map does not match what you see on the street, you can report it. Flag what looks wrong, suggest what should be there, or note if a tree has gone. Your reports help keep the map useful for everyone who uses the app.

Share a tree with a friend or open its location in your maps app when you want to visit it in person. Works offline, so you can browse and search without needing a connection.

For anyone who has ever wondered what that tree outside their flat actually is.
